description: Nomic provides an AI platform for architecture, engineering, and construction firms to work with project documents, drawings, standards, and related knowledge. It offers both a user-facing platform and developer APIs for parsing, search, and agent workflows over AEC data.
summary: Nomic exposes one tenant-scoped HTTP API for agents, files, parse, codes search, workflows, and admin functions, authenticated with bearer API keys created in each Nomic instance’s Developer Console.
